zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多趋势
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格在2128.35美元附近徘徊，较日内低点2125.29略有上行，显示多头尚有一定支撑。价格略高于20日均线2114.71美元，表明短期多头力量存在，但涨幅有限，市场呈现震荡整理特征。  

MACD指标为-1.39565，显示当前趋势仍偏弱，但负值幅度不大，意味着下行动能有限。RSI数据缺失，但结合均线和价格行为来看，短期仍倾向多头，但需警惕突破乏力或回调风险。短线投资者可关注关键阻力2133美元和支撑2125美元区域，保持灵活止盈止损策略。  

支撑位方面，2125美元为短期底部支撑，若跌破可能加速回调至2110美元附近。阻力位在2133美元，如果价格站稳该位置并伴随成交量放大，则有望进一步上攻至2140-2150美元区间。交易者可在支撑附近布局多单，同时在阻力区谨慎减仓或设置止盈。  

综合来看，以太坊当前短线呈震荡偏多趋势，多头占优但动力不足。建议保持谨慎乐观态度，关注关键支撑和阻力位的有效性，同时结合日内成交量和市场情绪调整仓位，以应对可能的快速波动。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading in a narrowly positive short-term range around 2128.35, holding modestly above its 20-period simple moving average at 2114.71, which suggests a mildly constructive near-term bias. The tight 24-hour range between 2125.29 and 2133.04 indicates low volatility and temporary equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Price maintaining above the moving average generally supports continuation potential, though the lack of expansion in range suggests conviction remains limited.

Momentum signals present a mixed picture. The MACD reading at -1.40 points to lingering bearish momentum beneath the surface, implying recent downside pressure has not fully dissipated even as price stabilizes. With RSI unavailable, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be confirmed, reducing momentum clarity. In this context, price action relative to the moving average becomes more important; sustained holding above 2115 would imply improving short-term strength despite negative MACD positioning.

Immediate support appears near 2125, aligned with the session low, with stronger technical support around 2115 at the 20-period SMA. A break below this zone could expose downside toward the psychological 2100 level. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 2133, the recent intraday high, followed by a broader resistance cluster near 2150 where momentum traders may become more active. A decisive breakout beyond resistance would improve bullish structure meaningfully.

For active traders, a cautious bullish bias is reasonable only if Ethereum holds above 2115 and breaks cleanly through 2133 with stronger momentum confirmation. Conservative participants may prefer waiting for MACD improvement before initiating long exposure. If price loses 2115, short-term bearish setups toward 2100 become more attractive. Given compressed volatility and incomplete indicator confirmation, disciplined stop placement and smaller position sizing are appropriate in the current environment.
